sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE:PKG) Earns Buy Rating from Truist Financial
feed.summary: Truist Financial has reiterated a "Buy" rating for Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE:PKG), setting a price target of $258.00, suggesting a potential upside of 20.9% from its current price. This endorsement comes despite Q1 revenue missing estimates, though EPS beat expectations. The article also notes significant institutional ownership and a recent insider stock sale.

feed.title: Portnoy Law Firm Announces Class Action on Behalf of Gartner, Inc. Investors
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between February 4, 2026, and February 8, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner made false and misleading statements regarding its contract value growth potential and consulting segment revenue outlook, while minimizing risks. Investors are encouraged to contact the law firm to discuss their legal rights, with a deadline of May 18, 2026, to file a lead plaintiff motion.

feed.title: MGM Resorts International (NYSE:MGM) Rating Increased to Overweight at KeyCorp
feed.summary: KeyCorp has upgraded MGM Resorts International (NYSE:MGM) from a "sector weight" to an "overweight" rating, setting a new target price of $117.00, suggesting a significant upside. This upgrade comes amidst mixed analyst ratings from other firms, with the consensus remaining "Hold" and an average price target of $46.81. The article also details recent insider transactions and institutional trading activity for MGM.

feed.title: Powell Industries (NASDAQ:POWL) Coverage Initiated at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. initiated coverage on Powell Industries (NASDAQ:POWL) with an "overweight" rating and a $310.00 price target, suggesting a potential upside of 22.65%. This report comes amidst other analyst ratings ranging from "strong-buy" to "hold" and significant insider selling activity, with major shareholders and executives divesting shares totaling over $44 million in the last three months. The company recently posted strong quarterly earnings, beating consensus estimates with $1.13 EPS on $251.18 million in revenue.

feed.title: Microsoft’s Q3 FY2026 Earnings Test: Will Azure Re-Accelerate or Extend Its Deceleration?
feed.summary: Investors are closely watching Microsoft's Q3 FY2026 earnings report on April 29 to see if Azure's growth re-accelerates past the 38% guided ceiling or if its deceleration continues. The company's AI monetization through Microsoft 365 Copilot and the impressive Commercial RPO of $625 billion are also key focus areas. The report will provide critical insights into whether Microsoft's substantial AI infrastructure investments are entering a monetization phase or if heavy spending needs to be sustained.

feed.title: Clearing the Runway: Boeing’s Q1 2026 Results Show 14% Revenue Growth and Narrowing Losses
feed.summary: The Boeing Company reported a 14% year-over-year revenue increase to $22,217 million for Q1 2026, driven by higher commercial airplane deliveries. The company also narrowed its GAAP net loss to ($7) million from ($31) million in the prior-year quarter, with core loss per share improving to ($0.20). Boeing highlighted strong demand, a record $695 billion backlog, and progress in certifications for its 737 MAX and 777X programs, while acknowledging ongoing risks related to industry conditions, supply chain, and production quality.

feed.title: PRLD Maintained by HC Wainwright & Co. -- Price Target Raised to $8
feed.summary: HC Wainwright & Co. analyst Robert Burns maintained a 'Buy' rating for Prelude Therapeutics (PRLD) and raised the price target to $8 from $5, a 60% increase. The positive outlook is based on the company's innovative pipeline in oncology. Despite a low GF Score™ of 37/100, indicating financial challenges, insider buying of $25.0 million in the past three months suggests confidence in the company's future.

feed.title: First BanCorp. upgraded to Strong Buy at Raymond James after Q1 results (FBP:NYSE)
feed.summary: Raymond James upgraded First BanCorp. (FBP) to "Strong Buy" from "Outperform" after the company reported better-than-expected first-quarter financial results. The bank's Q1 non-GAAP EPS was $0.57, surpassing expectations by $0.06, with revenue of $258.65M, aligning with forecasts.

feed.title: Beata Kirr takes on portfolios for 550 Northern Trust family-office clients
feed.summary: Northern Trust Wealth Management has appointed Beata Kirr as Chief Investment Officer of Global Family Office (GFO). In this role, Kirr will be responsible for overseeing investment strategy, leading portfolio construction, and providing investment insights for over 550 ultra-high-net-worth families and family offices. Kirr brings extensive experience from her previous roles at The Copia Group and Bernstein Private Wealth Management, and GFO President Dino De Vita highlighted her disciplined approach to asset allocation and manager selection.

feed.title: MGM Resorts International's all-inclusive package makes Vegas trips easy and economical
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has introduced an all-inclusive package at Luxor and Excalibur designed to simplify and economize quick getaways to Las Vegas. Starting at $330 plus tax for a two-day experience, the package includes dining options at several MGM properties, entertainment tickets to various shows, and attractions, with resort fees and parking also covered. The booking is for double occupancy, managed through the MGM Rewards app, and offers significant savings for visitors.

feed.title: Facebook posts promoting discounted Tractor Supply riding mowers if you fill out survey are scams
feed.summary: Facebook posts advertising Tractor Supply Co. riding lawn mowers for less than $10 after filling out a survey are scams. These fraudulent schemes misuse the company's name and logo to lure consumers into hidden monthly subscription fees. Victims are advised to contact their bank and report the fraud to the Federal Trade Commission.

feed.title: Luxembourg: Astorg to acquire Thermo Fisher Scientific’s microbiology business for US$1.075bn
feed.summary: Astorg, a private equity firm, has agreed to acquire Thermo Fisher Scientific's microbiology business for approximately US$1.075 billion. The microbiology business, which generated US$645 million in revenue in 2025, provides antimicrobial susceptibility testing and culture media solutions. Astorg plans to partner with management to accelerate organic growth, pursue M&A, and strengthen operational capabilities for the newly independent platform.

feed.title: School nutrition program reaching 11,000 wins Campbell’s Halo Award
feed.summary: Alliance for a Healthier Generation and The Campbell's Company received the 2026 Gold Halo Award for their Full Futures school nutrition program. This partnership aims to improve student health and food access in schools through pillars like culture, infrastructure, nutrition education, and food access. The program has engaged over 11,000 participants through initiatives including community farmers markets, school gardens, and culinary education.

feed.title: Power Solutions International, Inc. Investigated by the Portnoy Law Firm
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has launched an investigation into potential securities fraud involving Power Solutions International, Inc. (NASDAQ: PSIX) following a significant drop in the company's stock price. This investigation comes after a revised outlook from the company, projecting a slowdown in sales growth for 2025 that negatively impacted investor confidence. The firm is encouraging affected investors to contact them to discuss their legal options for recovering losses.

feed.title: Booking Holdings posts Q1 results at 4 p.m., call starts at 4:30
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) is scheduled to release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 28, 2026, at approximately 4:00 p.m. ET via a press release on its Investor Relations website. A conference call to discuss these results will follow at 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day, with a live webcast and audio replays available for seven days. Historically, similar earnings-timing announcements have resulted in modest stock price movements.

feed.title: Portnoy Law Firm Announces Class Action on Behalf of Pinterest, Inc. Investors
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit on behalf of Pinterest, Inc. (NYSE: PINS) investors who purchased securities between February 7, 2025, and February 12, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Pinterest failed to disclose reduced revenues from advertising partners and its inability to manage the impact of U.S. tariffs, which led to a significant stock price drop after the company announced lower-than-expected financial results and guidance on February 12, 2026. Investors have until May 29, 2026, to file a lead plaintiff motion.

feed.title: A 30-minute Honeywell CFO webcast is scheduled for May 19
feed.summary: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) announced its CFO, Mike Stepniak, will present at Wolfe Research's Global Transportation and Industrials Conference on May 19, 2026, from 8:00–8:30 a.m. EDT. A real-time audio webcast will be available on Honeywell’s Investor Relations site, www.honeywell.com/investor, along with related materials, and a replay will be accessible for 30 days after the event. The presentation will cover company updates and information on Honeywell's integrated operating system.

feed.title: Copilot adds Gen financial guidance for cards, loans and insurance
feed.summary: Gen (NASDAQ: GEN) announced that its Engine product will be integrated into Microsoft Copilot, MSN, and Bing to provide compliant, real-time financial insights and offers, covering credit cards, deposits, loans, and insurance. This collaboration aims to offer accurate, personalized financial guidance directly within Microsoft's digital experiences, with initial rollouts already underway. Despite the strategic integration, GEN's stock saw a moderate negative reaction, declining 2.73%.

feed.title: WILLIAMS-SONOMA, INC. LAUNCHES DORMIFY
feed.summary: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM) has launched Dormify, its tenth brand, aimed at students and young consumers needing solutions for dorms and compact living spaces. Dormify offers modern, functional home furnishings and a "Pick-Up Near Campus™" program, leveraging Williams-Sonoma's retail network. This expansion targets the small-space living market, allowing the company to connect with the next generation of customers.

feed.title: AbbVie’s Q1 2026 Preview: Can Skyrizi and Rinvoq Sustain a $7B Quarterly Immunology Run Rate?
feed.summary: AbbVie is preparing to report its Q1 2026 earnings, with investors focused on whether its immunology drugs, Skyrizi and Rinvoq, can continue rapid growth to offset Humira's biosimilar erosion. The combined sales of these two drugs exceeded the company's 2027 target two years early, reaching $25.866 billion in FY2025. The company's Q1 2026 results will be scrutinized for sustained immunology growth, potential updates to its full-year EPS guidance, and the performance of its diversified pipeline in neuroscience, aesthetics, and oncology.

feed.title: Barclays Adjusts Price Target on Essex Property Trust to $272 From $271, Maintains Equalweight Rating
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for Essex Property Trust (ESS) to $272 from $271, while reiterating an Equalweight rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a minor positive revision in Barclays' outlook for the residential REIT. The article notes this change amidst several other recent analyst adjustments for Essex Property Trust.

feed.title: RELX PLC’s Small Share Listing Puts Bigger AI and Buyback Test Back in Focus
feed.summary: RELX PLC made a small share listing for its employee plan, following a £350 million buyback and strong shareholder support. The larger question for investors is how RELX's AI strategy and pricing power will hold up against increasing competition in the professional workflow space, especially after Freshfields and Anthropic announced new legal AI tool developments. Despite concerns, analyst Rob Hales views RELX as deeply undervalued, believing AI innovation will benefit the company.

feed.title: Mizuho Securities Maintains Booking Holdings(BKNG.US) With Buy Rating, Cuts Target Price to $230
feed.summary: Mizuho Securities has reiterated its "Buy" rating on Booking Holdings (BKNG.US) shares. However, the firm has adjusted its price target for BKNG downwards to $230.

feed.title: Barclays Adjusts Price Target on Mid-America Apartment Communities to $137 From $138, Maintains Equalweight Rating
feed.summary: Barclays has updated its price target for Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) from $138 to $137, while choosing to maintain an Equalweight rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a slight change in the analyst's valuation of the company's shares.

feed.title: Barclays Adjusts Price Target on CF Industries to $145 From $130, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for CF Industries Holdings, Inc. to $145 from $130, while reiterating an Overweight rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects Barclays' updated outlook on the agricultural chemicals company. CF Industries specializes in the manufacturing and marketing of nitrate and phosphate fertilizers, with key products including ammonium, urea, and ammonium nitrate solutions.

feed.title: Barclays Adjusts Constellation Energy PT to $358 From $360, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Barclays has adjusted its price target for Constellation Energy (CEG) to $358, a slight reduction from its previous $360 target. Despite this minor change, the firm has maintained an "Overweight" rating on the stock. The article also notes other recent analyst adjustments for Constellation Energy from firms like Raymond James, Morgan Stanley, Seaport Global, TD Cowen, BMO Capital, KeyBanc, Wells Fargo, and Mizuho.

feed.title: Barclays Adjusts AvalonBay Communities PT to $206 From $202, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for AvalonBay Communities (AVB) from $202 to $206, while reaffirming an Overweight rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions for the residential REIT, indicating ongoing attention to the company's performance and market position. AvalonBay Communities specializes in developing, acquiring, owning, and operating apartment communities in high barrier-to-entry markets across the United States.

feed.title: LiveRamp adds NVIDIA GPU support to clean room platform By Investing.com
feed.summary: LiveRamp has integrated NVIDIA AI infrastructure into its clean room platform, enabling GPU-optimized computing for AI model training and deployment. This upgrade significantly accelerates AI model processing, making it up to 15 times faster than CPU-based environments, while maintaining data security. The company has also expanded its share repurchase program, partnered with Scowtt for AI-powered predictive models, and appointed Kristi Argyilan to its Board of Directors.

feed.title: Seagate To Rally More Than 19%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Monday
feed.summary: This article compiles 10 top analyst forecast changes for various companies, including updates to price targets and ratings. Notably, B of A Securities raised Seagate Technology Holdings PLC's price target to $700, suggesting a potential rally of over 19%. Other companies like Brunswick Corp, Equinix Inc, Lionsgate Studios Corp, Prelude Therapeutics Inc, SLB NV, First Bancorp, and Molina Healthcare Inc also received raised price targets, while Adobe Inc and Campbell's Co saw their ratings or price targets cut.

feed.title: Barclays Adjusts Price Target on Invitation Homes to $32 From $31, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for Invitation Homes (INVH) to $32 from $31, while maintaining an Overweight rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook from the analyst firm. The article also provides a list of recent analyst adjustments for Invitation Homes from various firms.

feed.title: Prologis Prices C$850 Million Senior Notes Offering
feed.summary: Prologis, L.P. has priced an offering of C$850 million in 4.250% senior unsecured notes due 2034, expecting to raise approximately C$839.9 million in net proceeds. These funds will be used for general corporate purposes, including repaying credit facilities and other debt. Prologis stock (PLD) currently holds a "Buy" rating from analysts with a $154.00 price target, and TipRanks' AI Analyst "Spark" also rates it as "Outperform" due to strong fundamentals and technical momentum.

feed.title: Prologis Prices C$850 Million Senior Unsecured Notes
feed.summary: Prologis, L.P. has successfully priced an offering of C$850 million in 4.250% senior unsecured notes due 2034, with the closing expected on April 27, 2026. The net proceeds of approximately C$839.9 million will be used for general corporate purposes, including debt repayment, to enhance funding flexibility and extend its debt maturity profile. This move aims to strengthen Prologis's financial position and support its investment strategies within the logistics sector.

feed.title: Johnson Controls acquires Nantum AI to accelerate AI-driven energy optimization and control capabilities within OpenBlue
feed.summary: Johnson Controls has acquired Nantum AI, a New York-based company specializing in AI algorithms for energy optimization. This acquisition strengthens Johnson Controls' OpenBlue digital ecosystem by integrating Nantum AI's proven algorithms, which enhance HVAC performance and reduce energy consumption through advanced AI-driven control capabilities. The combined offering aims to provide more comprehensive optimization for complex facilities and has already delivered over 10% energy savings in pilot programs.

feed.title: Broadcom: Isn't An Nvidia Killer, But It's A Growth Superstar Within The AI Ecosystem
feed.summary: Broadcom (AVGO) has emerged as a significant player in the AI ecosystem, not as an Nvidia competitor, but as a crucial enabler through its custom chips and advanced networking products. The company's growth in AI, combined with its ability to integrate offerings for greater impact, positions it as a strong growth superstar. Despite being smaller than Nvidia, Broadcom's market capitalization aligns well with its business size, making it a compelling "Buy."

feed.title: Adobe downgraded at Mizuho amid 'weakened' conviction (ADBE:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Mizuho Securities downgraded Adobe (ADBE) due to weakened conviction, citing intensifying competition in the prosumer/SMB segments. This competition is seen as a threat to Adobe's long-term terminal value. Following the downgrade, Adobe shares fell 1.5% in premarket trading.

feed.title: APA Corporation $APA Shares Bought by Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank
feed.summary: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank significantly increased its stake in APA Corporation by 59.4% in Q4, acquiring an additional 42,068 shares to reach a total of 112,895 shares valued at approximately $2.76 million. Meanwhile, corporate insider Matthew Regis Bob sold a substantial portion of his holdings, reducing his stake by 77.61%. Analysts currently maintain a "Hold" rating for APA with a consensus target price of $39.50.

feed.title: Merger expands Park National (NYSE: PRK) asset base and profitability
feed.summary: Park National Corporation (NYSE: PRK) reported an expanded asset base and profitability following its merger with First Citizens Bancshares, Inc. For Q1 2026, the company recorded total assets of $12,984 million, total loans of $9,667 million, and total deposits of $11,001 million, leading to a net income of $41,687 thousand. The merger significantly impacted the bank's financial metrics, reflected in an annualized return on average assets of 1.43% and a net interest margin of 4.80%.

feed.title: Electronic Arts Inc. $EA Stake Boosted by Vanguard Group Inc.
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. increased its stake in Electronic Arts (NASDAQ:EA) by 1.7% in Q4, acquiring an additional 485,030 shares and now owning 11.50% of the company, valued at approximately $5.88 billion. Despite this increase in institutional ownership, analysts maintain a consensus "Hold" rating for EA with an average price target of $188.30, and company insiders have been net sellers in recent months. Electronic Arts also recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.19 per share.

feed.title: Brands get up to 15x faster AI model runs in LiveRamp's NVIDIA push
feed.summary: LiveRamp has integrated NVIDIA AI infrastructure into its clean room architecture, enabling brands and AI partners to train and deploy sophisticated models up to 15 times faster. This upgrade supports compute-intensive AI workloads through GPU-optimized infrastructure, eliminating the need for AI partners to rearchitect models for CPU-based environments. The partnership aims to provide marketers with faster results, easier access to advanced AI models, and scaled distribution for AI partners, all while maintaining data security and protecting intellectual property.

feed.title: Greenland Energy (NASDAQ: GLND) Signs Halliburton Agreement for 2026 Jameson Land Drilling Campaign
feed.summary: Greenland Energy (NASDAQ: GLND) has signed an agreement with Halliburton for integrated consulting and logistical services for its 2026 drilling campaign in the Jameson Land Basin of Greenland. This partnership, following other strategic agreements, secures advanced well technologies and expertise for operations in the Arctic. The collaboration is a key step in Greenland Energy's strategy to responsibly develop the region's hydrocarbon resources and drill its first two wells in 2026.

feed.title: Top 3 catalysts for Nasdaq 100 Index and QQQ ETF this week
feed.summary: The Nasdaq 100 Index and QQQ ETF are at record highs, driven by a risk-on sentiment and an ongoing ceasefire between the US and Iran. Key catalysts this week include big-tech earnings reports, which will provide insights into AI spending ROI, and the Federal Reserve's interest rate decision, with market reaction depending on the tone of Jerome Powell's "farewell" comments. Additionally, updates on the US-Iran situation could significantly impact crude oil prices and the stock market.

feed.title: Halliburton joins Greenland’s bid to drill 2 Arctic wells in 2026
feed.summary: Greenland Energy (NASDAQ: GLND) has signed an agreement with Halliburton for integrated consulting, logistics, and well and drilling services for its 2026 onshore campaign in the Jameson Land Basin. This partnership, which follows agreements with Stampede Drilling and Desgagnés, aims to support the planned drilling of the first two wells in 2026 within this 2 million-acre, undrilled frontier basin. The news prompted a positive market reaction, with GLND stock gaining 9.34%.

feed.title: OptimumBank tells shareholders how it hit 21.56% returns in 2025
feed.summary: OptimumBank Holdings (OPHC) will hold its Annual Shareholder Meeting and Investor Day on April 28, 2026, to highlight its most successful year, with a Core Return on Average Equity (ROAE) of 21.56% and a Net Interest Margin (NIM) of 4.28% for fiscal 2025. The company will also present updated Q1 2026 performance data. Investors can attend virtually, and the presentation deck is available online.

feed.title: OptimumBank Holdings, Inc. Reports Best Year in Company History; To Present Shareholder Deck Highlighting 21%+ Core ROAE at April 28, 2026 Annual Meeting
feed.summary: OptimumBank Holdings, Inc. announced its Annual Shareholder Meeting and Investor Day for April 28, 2026, where it will present the company's most successful year to date. Key highlights for fiscal year 2025 include a Core Return on Average Equity (ROAE) of 21.56% and a Net Interest Margin (NIM) of 4.28%, with updated performance data for Q1 2026 also to be shared. The public is invited to attend virtually to learn more about the ongoing operational momentum and strategic growth.

feed.title: Invesco Ltd: Form 8.3 - Aptitude Software Group PLC; Public dealing disclosure
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. has filed a Form 8.3 public dealing disclosure regarding Aptitude Software Group PLC. The disclosure details Invesco's interests and short positions in Aptitude Software Group PLC's ordinary shares, showing ownership of 1,079,323 shares representing 1.97% of the company. It also reports a recent sale of 2,500 ordinary shares at a price of 2.33 GBP per unit.

feed.title: Raymond James Adjusts Vistra PT to $208 From $240, Maintains Strong Buy Rating
feed.summary: Raymond James has revised its price target for Vistra Corp. (VST) reducing it from $240 to $208, while reiterating a "Strong Buy" rating for the stock. The article also lists recent analyst price target adjustments for Vistra from other firms like Jefferies, Morgan Stanley, JPMorgan, and BNP Paribas, indicating ongoing analyst attention to the company. Vistra Corp. is described as an integrated retail and electric power generation company, operating in various segments with approximately 41,000 megawatts of installed generation capacity.

feed.title: Argus Research Adjusts Tractor Supply Price Target to $50 From $64, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Argus Research has lowered its price target for Tractor Supply (TSCO) shares to $50 from $64, while still maintaining a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst several other analyst firms also updating their price targets for the company in late April. Despite the revised target, Argus Research continues to recommend the stock as a Buy.

feed.title: Domino's Hit By Budget-Conscious Diners, Shares Tumble
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza (NASDAQ: DPZ) saw its shares tumble after reporting first-quarter earnings and revenue that missed analyst expectations, primarily due to budget-conscious consumers cutting back on dining out. Despite increased operating income and strong cash flow, the company's U.S. and international same-store sales growth was modest or negative, reflecting challenges from persistent inflation and rising costs. Domino's announced a new $1.0 billion share repurchase program alongside its dividend declaration, aiming to return value to shareholders.

feed.title: Citi expanding investment banking in Japan and China - report (C:NYSE)
feed.summary: Citigroup is reportedly expanding its investment banking teams in Japan and China by adding senior bankers. This initiative aims to increase cross-border M&A deals and comes as the bank finalizes a multi-year global restructuring.

feed.title: Verdence Capital Advisors LLC Raises Stock Holdings in Netflix, Inc. $NFLX
feed.summary: Verdence Capital Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in Netflix, Inc. during the fourth quarter, boosting its holdings by 565% to 18,653 shares valued at approximately $1.75 million. This increase occurred despite company insiders being net sellers, with insiders selling over $136 million worth of shares. Netflix recently surpassed quarterly earnings estimates and holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from MarketBeat analysts with a target price of $114.53.
